aesthetic.self_description: Refined, polished, and French cool but with a little edge. Not hyper-feminine.
aesthetic.refined_description: High-low sophistication with intentional contrasts — vintage jeans with runway blazers, effortlessly put together but with thoughtful details that reveal themselves on closer inspection. Polished and in-charge while remaining approachable.

color.notes: Aspires to incorporate more sophisticated color like recent Celine and Chanel runway shows — rich, saturated tones rather than sweet or feminine colors

silhouette.preferred_proportions: Contrasting silhouettes — fitted pieces with wide bottoms, structured blazers with relaxed pants
silhouette.notes: Loves mixing fitted and loose pieces, takes all pants to tailor for perfect fit and length. Signature look is open button-down over fitted tank/tee

fabric.notes: Actively seeks texture play, learning to appreciate top-tier fabrics. Feels more polished and powerful in quality materials

lifestyle.notes: Balances desire for styled outfits with practical realities of parenting and hot climate. Changes out of nice clothes immediately when home to protect from kids

disliked_trends: old lady upper east sider prim proper
uncomfortable_with: anything that makes her stick out inappropriately for local casual culture
avoid.notes: Very aware of proportions that work for 5'4" frame, avoids trends that would shorten or widen legs

body_and_fit.notes: Takes all pants to tailor for perfect fit, comfortable trying different silhouettes as long as proportions work

aspirations.direction: More intentional texture play and sophisticated color integration while maintaining effortless cool
wardrobe_gaps: styled looks beyond button-down layering formula
aspirations.notes: Wants to graduate from blue jeans as default and rely less on open button-down over tank formula

shopping.notes: Values fabric quality and fit above all, attracted to pieces with unique details like Ossou's bi-color buttons
